title: Blinding Lights

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes one of the largest modern streaming footprints in pop plus strong songwriter economics.

ownership.master_owner: Mix of label and artist-affiliated participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final take-home
ownership.notes: Modern superstar songs can produce very high gross revenue, but label and publishing splits still matter.

meaning_summary: This song combines direct emotion with a strong melodic center, making it easy to revisit and commercially durable.
revenue_drivers: Streaming scale and playlist inclusion remain the largest recurring drivers.
A durable hook and broad familiarity help the song keep earning across catalog listening.
Sync, social reuse, and seasonal spikes can lift the baseline.
